purpose: Close four reviewed exchange candidates after promotion through D-1000 BX27.

entries.notes: BX27 promotes Ndax after current first-party Canadian trading-platform review and independent non-zero spot-volume verification. NDAX is preserved as an alias.
BX27 promotes NovaDAX after current first-party Brazilian exchange review and independent current BRL and USDT spot-market and volume verification.

BX27 promotes One Trading after current first-party Netherlands venue and regulatory review plus independent current spot-market and volume verification. The Bitpanda Pro rebrand remains within one entity.
BX27 promotes Paymium after current first-party French exchange and MiCA service review plus independent current BTC-EUR market and volume verification.
